messages.content:
With the start of the Industrial Revolution, industrial design...
birth
borned
was born
birthed
was borned
was born

Which of these words doesn't have the same meaning as the other ones?
white space
outer space
blank space
empty space
outer space

The first fashion designer who set up the fashion design house in Paris was
Coco Chanel Guccio Gucci Charles Worth Mario Prada
Charles Worth

White space is a typographic pattern which is…
contrasting fonts, colors, sizes, and styles
negative space to emphasize important information
visual balance to create a harmonious composition
font sizes and styles to create a visual hierarchy
negative space to emphasize important information
The type of design that can help people feel more engaged and connected to the product and also be used to make products more accessible to users with disabilities is…
inclusive design

The type of design that can help people feel more engaged and connected to the product and also be used to make products more accessible to users with disabilities is…
Organization design
Technology design
Personalized design

Disability design
Disability design
The period in the 18th century in Europe when many people began to emphasize the importance of science and reason, rather than religion and tradition is called...
The period in the 18th century in Europe when many people began to emphasize the importance of science and reason, rather than religion and tradition is called the Enlightenment.
The process of creating an attractive and functional package for a product is called… Furniture design ￼ Product packaging design ￼ Transportation design ￼ Organizational design
Product packaging design
The design or use of signs and symbols to communicate a message, including wayfinding, informational signage, anc advertising is called ...
The design or use of signs and symbols to communicate a message, including wayfinding, informational signage, and advertising is called graphic design.
The design or use of signs and symbols to communicate a message, including wayfinding, informational signage, anc advertising is called ...
The design or use of signs and symbols to communicate a message, including wayfinding, informational signage, and advertising is called signage design.
A process of design applied to physical products that are to be manufactured by mass production is called.
A process of design applied to physical products that are to be manufactured by mass production is called industrial design.

Art Deco design is...
glamorous and functional
simple and minimalistic
religious or spiritual
ornate and elaborate
Art Deco design is ornate and elaborate.

Byzantine design was heavily influenced by:
Greek and Roman art
Chinese art
Prehistoric art
Islamic art
Byzantine design was heavily influenced by Greek and Roman art.

One of the most notable features of Contemporary Design is:
the importance of harmony and balance
to provide a positive user experience
to intricate decoration and harmonious proportions
the use of symbols and hieroglyphs
One of the most notable features of Contemporary Design is the importance of harmony and balance.
A transitional architectural style that existed in the Soviet Union in the 1930s, typical of early Stalinist architecture before World War II, is called...

A transitional architectural style that existed in the Soviet Union in the 1930s, typical of early Stalinist architecture before World War II, is called Socialist Classicism or Stalinist architecture.
Powers to apply several knowledge and skills simultaneously in order to complete a task or perform an observable behavior are called.
Powers to apply several knowledge and skills simultaneously in order to complete a task or perform an observable behavior are called cognitive abilities or cognitive skills.
The experience of someone using a product, system, or service, for example whether they find it enjoyable and easy to use is called ...
The experience of someone using a product, system, or service, for example whether they find it enjoyable and easy to use, is called user experience (UX).

The main merit of the first design schools is ... creation of the ideological and methodological core of design activity ￼ making design a powerful tool for industry and trade ￼ establishing a specific point of view on the design problem as a whole ￼ determining the relationship of design with the entire system of culture
The main merit of the first design schools is determining the relationship of design with the entire system of culture.

Industrial designers use a variety of design techniques to ... collaborate with engineers, manufacturers, marketers, and other stakeholders ￼ note the revolutionary changes in the architecture of buildings ￼ create and refine sketches, computer-aided design, interactive prototypes etc. ￼ convey ideas, feelings, and attitudes of graphic images

Industrial designers use a variety of design techniques to collaborate with engineers, manufacturers, marketers, and other stakeholders, create and refine sketches, computer-aided design, interactive prototypes, etc.

Industrial designers use a variety of design techniques to … 

collaborate with engineers, manufacturers, marketers, and other stakeholders ￼ note the revolutionary changes in the architecture of buildings ￼ create and refine sketches, computer-aided design, interactive prototypes etc. ￼ convey ideas, feelings, and attitudes of graphic images

Industrial designers use a variety of design techniques to collaborate with engineers, manufacturers, marketers, and other stakeholders, create and refine sketches, computer-aided design, interactive prototypes, etc. They do not typically focus on noting revolutionary changes in the architecture of buildings or conveying ideas, feelings, and attitudes of graphic images.
Shortening the length of time required for an operation, activity, etc. is called…
Shortening the length of time required for an operation, activity, etc. is called efficiency improvement or time optimization.
The art of arranging the features of an area of land for aesthetic and/or practical reasons is called.
The art of arranging the features of an area of land for aesthetic and/or practical reasons is called landscape design.
